## ✨ Editions

This GitHub download is the **local-only, open-source edition** of Parley — fully on-device, bring your own AI providers, with **no account or cloud code** in the build. For **sign-in, cross-device sync, and shared team organizations**, get the **cloud edition** from the Parley website.

## ☁️ Cloud edition

- **See who's in an organization** — each org now shows its member roster (avatar, name/email, role), with **you** marked.
- **Clearer errors** — a failed invite now tells you why (already a member, already invited, not allowed to invite) instead of an opaque error code.
- **Role-aware controls** — the invite box only appears for an org's owner/admin, and the delete control only for its owner, so you're never shown an action you can't perform.

## 🐛 Fixes

- In-flight buttons (invite / create / accept / delete) now show a spinner + label instead of a bare "…".

## macOS — how to open

This build is **ad-hoc signed** (not yet notarized with an Apple Developer ID). In-app auto-updates install cleanly and shouldn't trip a prompt. For a manual install, on first open macOS shows a security prompt:

- **Right-click (or Control-click) the app → Open → Open**, or
- **System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway** (after the first blocked attempt).

If a download still shows "damaged", clear the quarantine once:

```
xattr -cr /Applications/Parley.app
```
